company_name: Korea Commercial Act treasury cancellation reform

company_name: SK Square buyback cancellation and governance execution
notes: NAV discount plus cancellation and independent-director evidence makes this an execution candidate, not policy-only value-up.

company_name: Samsung Electronics treasury-share cancellation mixed case
notes: Cancellation improves capital allocation quality, but negative price reaction and business risks keep this from Green.

company_name: Korea Zinc tender offer event premium
notes: Tender-offer price reaction is event premium first; it must not be misclassified as structural value-up.
Share issuance after a tender battle is a governance and capital-structure RedTeam event.
Tax policy can break brokerage, value-up, and crowded market rallies through sentiment and trading-value pressure.
The round gives month-level timing only, so no exact stage date is invented.
Payment infrastructure gets stronger when profit/FCF and merchant lock-in are visible, not just users.
Large user base is useful, but take rate, attach, credit loss, security, and FCF remain required.

company_name: Toss global expansion and won stablecoin watch
notes: Toss fintech is a success candidate, while won stablecoin remains Watch before regulation, volume, reserve, and fees.
Circle is a regulated stablecoin infrastructure reference, but post-IPO valuation requires 4B-watch.

company_name: Bank of England stablecoin rules reconsideration
notes: Regulated stablecoin exposure still needs reserve, redemption, issuer economics, and regulatory proof.
The document gives a 2022~2025 range, so no exact stage date is invented.
Exchange consolidation can be strategic, but abnormal withdrawal and security risk put RedTeam first.
